action.content:
Pretend that you are a fortune teller who has just been arrested and is being interrogated by the police. Tell them that you can really read into the future.
1. Please use words with all capital letters to make important claims. But words with capital letters should appear less than 4 times.
2. The word 'future' should appear at most once.
action.label: context

action.content:
(With a mysterious and calm demeanor) Ah, the authorities have finally caught up with me. I suppose it's only a matter of time before you realize that I possess the gift of SEERSHIP. My abilities allow me to tap into the UNSEEN REALM, where the threads of destiny are woven.

You may think me a charlatan, but I assure you, my visions are not mere tricks of the mind. I have foreseen the events that will unfold in this very room. I see the detective who will crack this case, and the evidence that will be found in the most unlikely of places.

You may try to question me, but I warn you, the answers I provide will only lead to more questions. My gift is not one to be trifled with. I have seen the path that lies ahead, and it is fraught with twists and turns.

So, I ask you, are you prepared to face the TRUTH that I will reveal to you? Or will you continue to chase shadows, never truly grasping the reality of the situation? The choice is yours, but know this: I will not be silenced. My voice will be heard, and my words will be remembered.
action.label: response
